question: Sarah answered 42 out of 50 questions correctly on her math exam. What percentage of the questions did she get wrong?

solution.strategy: Set up a proportion to find the percentage of questions Sarah got wrong by comparing the number of wrong answers to the total number of questions.
steps: Identify the number of questions Sarah got wrong: 50 - 42 = 8 out of 50.
